description_long: This sculpture depicts a life-sized human male figure standing upright on a rectangular stone pedestal. The figure is dressed in a suit, with one hand in his pocket and the other arm relaxed by his side, exuding a formal and contemplative demeanor. The pedestal is made of a light-colored stone with visible veining, and there appears to be an inscription or plaque on the front face. The sculpture is set on a paved surface, likely outdoors, with the shadow of the figure cast onto the ground. The overall finish of the figure is dark and metallic, contrasting with the lighter stone base. The setting suggests it is a commemorative or honorary statue, possibly of a notable individual.
description: A life-sized bronze statue of a man in a suit stands on a light stone pedestal with an inscription, set on a paved outdoor surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the man's face, suit details, and the inscription on the pedestal.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the figure and the pedestal, with the figure's posture and suit folds visible.
description_view_2: Three-quarter rear view showing the figure's back and side, with the pedestal's stone texture and shadow.
description_view_3: Side/front view focusing on the figure's profile and the clean side of the pedestal.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed outdoors on a paved surface, likely in a public urban space such as a plaza or sidewalk.
